case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. SERGEY SIDOROV

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON. DEFENDANT SERGEY SIDOROV IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED HE IS REQUESTING A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
